response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive senior-level experience in software development, leadership, and open-source contributions, aligning well with the Head of Development role. His long-term roles at re:cinq and Optilyz showcase leadership in technical architecture and team collaboration, while his open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective) reflect a deep understanding of Linux/Unix environments and modern development practices. However, his German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic,' which may impact client-facing responsibilities in a German-speaking context.
strengths: Extensive senior-level experience in full-stack development and technical leadership (15+ years at re:cinq)
Strong background in open-source technologies, Linux/Unix environments, and architectural design (e.g., GISCollective, Dlang projects)
Proven track record in mentoring teams, TDD, CI/CD, and multi-language expertise (TypeScript, Python, Java, C++)
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic,' which may hinder client communication in a German-speaking context
Limited explicit experience in UML modeling and requirements management, though his architectural work suggests some exposure
No direct evidence of strategic IT security or compliance experience, though his work in high-performance systems may imply some familiarity
